## Get Catalogs

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-catalogs>`

Action to get the list of catalog IDs with no filtering. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to
the `/product/catalogs/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/catalogs` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>catalogId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the requested catalog.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>The query parameter. Maximum records to retrieve per request. The minimum value is 0.</p></td><td><p>0</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>The query parameter. Used to retrieve the results based on a particular resource offset. The maximum value is 50.</p></td><td><p>25</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Categories From Catalog

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-categories-from-catalog>`

Action to get all the categories with no filtering. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/product/catalogs/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/catalogs/{catalogId}/categories`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>catalogId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the requested catalog.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>The query parameter. Maximum records to retrieve per request. The minimum value is 0.</p></td><td><p>0</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>The query parameter. Used to retrieve the results based on a particular resource offset. The maximum value is 50.</p></td><td><p>25</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Category From Catalog

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-category-from-catalog>`

Action to read an existing category within a catalog.

By default, the server also returns the first level of subcategories, but you can specify another
level by setting the `levels` parameter. Using a large value for the `levels` parameter can cause
performance issues if the category tree is large and deep.

This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/product/catalogs/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/catalogs/{catalogId}/categories/{categoryId}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>catalogId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the requested catalog</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>categoryId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the category to be created</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>levels</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>Level number query parameter. The minimum value is 0.</p></td><td><p>0</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Coupon

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-coupon>`

Returns coupon information for the given coupon ID. If the user role does not have the
`View_Coupon_Codes` permission, then the coupon codes that are returned are masked. This operation
makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/pricing/coupons/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/coupons/{couponId}` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>couponId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the coupon.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Coupon Codes

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-coupon-codes>`

Gets the coupon codes for the given coupon. If the user role does not have the `View_Coupon_Codes`
permission, then the coupon codes returned are masked. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to
the `/pricing/coupons/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/coupons/{couponId}/codes` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>couponId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the coupon.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum records to retrieve per request query parameter. The minimum value is 0.</p></td><td><p>0</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>The query parameter used to retrieve the results based on a particular resource offset. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Customer From Customer List

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-customer-from-customer-from-customer-list>`

Action to get customer information. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/customer/customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customer-lists/{listId}/customers/{customerNo}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default - [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR

## Get Gift Certificate

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-gift-certificate>`

Action to get gift certificate information using the merchant ID. This operation makes an HTTP GET
request to the
`/pricing/gift-certificates/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/gift-certificates/{merchantId}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>merchantId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Merchant ID of the requested gift certificate.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Product

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-product>`

Action to get product information. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{productId}` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default endpoint.

## Get Product Options

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-product-options>`

Read local and shared product options of a product. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{productId}/product-options`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>productId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Product ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>The query parameter for maximum number of records to retrieve per request. The minimum value is 0.</p></td><td><p>0</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>The query parameter used to retrieve the results based on a particular resource offset. The maximum value is 50.</p></td><td><p>25</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>currency</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The query param for currency</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Get Source Code Group

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-source-code-group>`

Action to retrieve source code group information. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/pricing/source-code-groups/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/source-code-groups/{id}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the source code group to get.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Variation Attribute

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-variation-attribute>`

Action to get only variation attribute information for master product. This operation makes an HTTP
GET request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{productId}/variation-attributes/{id}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>productId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the product</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the variation attribute to get</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time request to the

## Get Variation Attributes

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-variation-attributes>`

Reads variation attributes of a product of type variant, variation master, or variation group. This
operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{productId}/variation-attributes`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>productId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the product</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>The query parameter for the maximum number of records to retrieve per request. The minimum value is 0.</p></td><td><p>0</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>The query parameter used to retrieve the results based on a particular resource offset. The maximum value is 50.</p></td><td><p>25</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Variation For Master Product

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-variation-for-master-product>`

Read a variation for a product master. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{masterProductId}/variations/{id}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default ## Get Variation Groups For Master Product

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-variation-groups-for-master-product>`

Reads variation groups for a product master. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{masterProductId}/variation-groups`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>masterProductId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the master product that contains the variation group.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>Query parameter for the maximum number of records to retrieve per request. The minimum value is 0.</p></td><td><p>0</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>Query parameter used to retrieve the results based on a particular resource offset. The maximum value is 50.</p></td><td><p>25</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Variations For Master Product

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-variations-for-master-product>`

Reads variation for a product master. This operation makes an HTTP GET request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{masterProductId}/variations`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>masterProductId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the master product that contains the variation group.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>limit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>Query parameter for the maximum number of records to retrieve per request. The minimum value is 0.</p></td><td><p>0</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>offset</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>Query parameter used to retrieve the results based on a particular resource offset. The maximum value is 50.</p></td><td><p>25</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Get Variations For Master Product

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:get-variations-for-master-product>`

Searches for gift certificates. The query attribute specifies a complex query that can be used to
narrow down the search. This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
`/pricing/gift-certificates/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/gift-certificates` endpoint.

This is the list of searchable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th><th>Sortable</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>merchantId</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>maskedGiftCertificateCode *</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>no</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderNo</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>senderName</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>recipientName</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>recipientEmail</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>status</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>enabled</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>message</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>description</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>Date</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>currencyMnemonic **</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Notes

- `maskedGiftCertificateCode`, also known as `code`, can only be used in a term query.  
  If a four-character code is supplied, it is assumed that the search is on the unmasked portion of
  the code, otherwise, the full code must be matched. Text queries are not allowed.
- `currencyMnemonic` can only be joined with other attributes using a conjunction (`AND`).
- Only searchable attributes can be used in sorting.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Promotions Search

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:promotions-search>`

Searches for promotions. The SearchRequest document contains a search object that allows filtering
on various attributes.

The query attribute specifies a complex query that can be used to narrow down the search using the
following searchable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>currecyCode</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>exclusivity</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>enabled</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

Note that only searchable attributes can be used in sorting. Additionally, the following attribute
can be used to sort:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>promotionClass</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
`/pricing/promotions/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/promotions` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Remove Address For Customer In Customer List

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:remove-address-for-customer-in-customer-list>`

Action that deletes a customer address. This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
`/customer/customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customer-lists/{listId}/customers/{customerNo}/addresses/{addressId}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>listId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>List ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>addressId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Address ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>customerNo</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Customer number.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR

- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Search Catalogs

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:search-catalogs>`

Searches for catalogs.

The query attribute specifies a complex query that can be used to narrow down the search with the
following searchable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>description</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

There are two additional fields that can be used as search filters. They are not attributes in the
`CatalogWO` object, but can be used as filters to query catalogs based on site assignments.

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>isMasterCatalog</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>isStorefrontCatalog</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>description</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>online</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>position</p></td><td><p>Double</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

When isMasterCatalog is used in the search query, catalogs without any site assignments are
returned. When isStorefrontCatalog is used in the search query, catalogs with one or more site
assignments are returned.

The output of the query can also be sorted with the following sortable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>description</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
`/product/catalogs/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/catalog-search` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Search Categories

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:search-categories>`

Searches for catalog categories anywhere they appear. By default, the server also returns the first
level of subcategories, but you can specify another level by setting the levels parameter. Please
note, using a large value for levels may cause performance issues with a large and deep category
tree. The query attribute specifies a complex query that can be used to narrow down the search with
the following searchable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>description</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>online</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>catalogId</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

The output of the query can also be sorted with the following sortable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>description</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>online</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>position</p></td><td><p>Double</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
`/product/catalogs/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/category-search` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>levels</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>Level number. The minimum value is <code>0</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Search Categories In Catalog

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:search-categories-in-catalog>`

Searches for catalog categories in the scope of the catalog. By default, the server also returns the
first level of subcategories, but you can specify another level by setting the `levels` parameter.
Using a large value for `levels` can cause performance issues with a large and deep category tree.

The query attribute specifies a complex query that can be used to narrow down the search with the
following searchable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>description</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>online</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>parentCategoryId</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

The output of the query can also be sorted with the following sortable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>description</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>online</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>position</p></td><td><p>Double</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
`/product/catalogs/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/catalogs/{catalogId}/category-search`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>catalogId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The ID of the requested catalog</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>levels</p></td><td><div><div><p>Integer</p></div></div></td><td><p>Level number. The minimum value is <code>0</code>.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Search Customer In Customer List

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:search-customer-in-customer-list>`

Action to search for customers in a customer list.

The query attribute specifies a complex query that can be used to narrow down the search. These are
the list of searchable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>customerNo</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>firstName</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>secondName</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>lastName</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>suffix</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>salutation</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>title</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>fax</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>phoneHome</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>phoneBusiness</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>phoneMobile</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>email</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>gender</p></td><td><p>Integer</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>companyName</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>credentials.login</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>credentials.enabled</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
`/customer/customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customer-lists/{customerListId}/customer-search`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>customerListId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Customer list ID in which to search.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
