- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Search Product Variations

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:search-product-variations>`

Searches product variations for master product or variation group product.

The query attribute specifies a complex query that can be used to narrow down the search. The list
of searchable attributes includes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th><th>Sortable</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>productId</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>online</p></td><td><p>SiteSpecific Boolean</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>inStock</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>searchable</p></td><td><p>SiteSpecific Boolean</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>ats - Actual available quantity to sell</p></td><td><p>Double</p></td><td><p>yes</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

> [!NOTE] The calculated value of `online` and `searchable` is used in the search and sort. A search
> or sort by the site-specific attributes requires the Site ID query parameter to be set. The site
> ID query parameters are:

- `online`
- `inStock`
- `searchable`
- `ats`

It is assumed that every field that starts with `variationAttribute.` is searchable and the dot is
followed by "ATTRIBUTE_ID".

This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{productId}/variant-search`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>productId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Product ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Search Products

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:search-products>`

Searches for products. The query attribute specifies a complex query that can be used to narrow the
search. Attributes are grouped into different buckets.

The following is a list of searchable attributes with their corresponding buckets:

Main:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>online</p></td><td><p>SiteSpecific Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>searchable</p></td><td><p>SiteSpecific Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>validFrom</p></td><td><p>SiteSpecific DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>validTo</p></td><td><p>SiteSpecific DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>type</p></td><td><p>ProductType</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

Catalog:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>catalogId</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

Category:

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th><th>Sortable</th></tr></thead></table>

The sortable properties are:

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th><th>Sortable</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>name</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/product-search` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Search Products Assigned To Category

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:search-products-assigned-to-category>`

Searches for category product assignments. The query attribute specifies a complex query that can be
used to narrow the search.

The following are searchable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>productId</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>productName</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>onlineFlag</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>searchable</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>validFrom</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>validTo</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

Sortable Fields:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>productId</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>productName</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>position</p></td><td><p>Double</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
`/product/catalogs/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/catalogs/{catalogId}/categories/{categoryId}/category-product-assignment-search`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>categoryId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the category.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>catalogId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the requested catalog.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. ## Source Code Groups Search

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:source-code-groups-search>`

Searches for source code groups.

The query attribute specifies a complex query that can be used to narrow the search with the
following searchable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>description</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>sourceCode</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>startTime</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>endTime</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>enabled</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>active</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

The `sourceCode` and `active` fields can only be used in queries as conjunctions (using `AND`). If
the field is used in a disjunction (`OR`), an exception will be thrown.

The output of the query can also be sorted, with the following sortable attributes:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Type</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>description</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>enabled</p></td><td><p>Boolean</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>creationDate</p></td><td><p>DateTime</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

This operation makes an HTTP POST request to the
`/pricing/source-code-groups/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/source-code-groups` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>categoryId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the category.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>catalogId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the requested catalog.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Unassign Product From Category

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:unassign-product-from-category>`

Removes a category product assignment.

For example, if products A, B, and C are at positions 1, 2, and 7.5 and you delete the assignment
for product B, the products A, B, and C move up one position, and position 7.5 is left null.

This operation makes an HTTP DELETE request to the
`/product/catalogs/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/catalogs/{catalogId}/categories/{categoryId}/products/{productId}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>categoryId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the category.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>catalogId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the requested catalog,</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>productId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID (SKU) of the requested product to assign.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Unassign Variation From Master Product

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:unassign-variation-from-master-product>`

Unassign a variation product from a product master. The variation product itself is not deleted; it
remains as a normal product after it is unassigned from product master.

This operation makes an HTTP DELETE request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{masterProductId}/variations/{id}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>masterProductId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the master product that contains the variation group.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the variation product.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Unassign Variation Group From Master Product

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:unassign-variation-group-from-master-product>`

Unassign a variation group product from a product master. The variation group product itself is not
deleted; it remains as a normal product after it is unsassigned from the product master.

This operation makes an HTTP DELETE request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{masterProductId}/variation-groups/{id}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>masterProductId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the master product that contains the variation group.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the variation group product.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Address For Customer In Customer List

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-address-for-customer-in-customer-list>`

Action that updates an address of a customer with the given address information. This operation
makes an HTTP PATCH request to the
`/customer/customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customer-lists/{listId}/customers/{customerNo}/addresses/{addressId}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>listId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the list with the customer address to update.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>addressId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Customer address ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>customerNo</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Customer number.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Update Campaign

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-campaign>`

Updates the campaign with the specified information. This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to
the `/pricing/campaigns/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/campaigns/{campaignId}` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API campaign.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the the `/product/catalogs/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/catalogs/{catalogId}` endpoint.

to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Coupon Codes

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-coupon-codes>`

Add or delete (modify) multiple codes to and from the supplied coupon. This operation makes an HTTP
POST request to the
`/pricing/coupons/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/coupons/{couponId}/codes` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>couponId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the coupon to update</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR

- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR

- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Customer In Customer List

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-customer-in-customer-list>`

Updates the customer with the specified information. The customer number is allowed to be updated
but results in a `CustomerNumberAlreadyInUseException` if there is an existing customer with the
same customer number.

This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to the
`/customer/customers/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/customer-lists/{listId}/customers/{customerNo}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>listId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>List ID of the list to which the customer belongs.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>customerNo</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Customer number.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Gift Certificate

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-gift-certificate>`

Updates the gift certificate with the specified information using merchant ID. This operation makes
an HTTP PATCH request to the
`/pricing/gift-certificates/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/gift-certificates/{merchantId}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default certificate.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data ## Update Order

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-order>`

Updates the order. This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to the
`/checkout/orders/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/orders/{orderNo}` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one ## Update Order Confirmation Status

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-order-confirmation-status>`

Updates the order confirmation status. This operation makes an HTTP PUT request to the
`/checkout/orders/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/orders/{orderNo}/confirmation-status`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default - DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Order Export Status

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-order-export-status>`

Updates the order export status. Setting the status to `EXPORTED` also triggers the finalization of
on-order inventory transactions for this order, meaning that all inventory transactions with the
on-order type are moved into final inventory transactions. This is only relevant when on-order
inventory is turned on for the inventory list ordered products are in.

This operation makes an HTTP PUT request to the
`/checkout/orders/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/orders/{orderNo}/export-status` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderNo</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Order number.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

endpoint.

endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderNo</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Order number.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Order Status

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-order-status>`

Updates the order status. Orders that are have statuses of NEW, COMPLETED, or CANCELLED cannot be
set to a status of CREATED or FAILED. This operation makes an HTTP PUT request to the
`/checkout/orders/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/orders/{orderNo}/status` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderNo</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Order number.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Product

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-product>`

Update a product using the information provided.

Fields that can be updated include:

- name
- pageDescription
- longDescripton
- pageTitle
- pageKeywords
- brand
- ean
- upc
- manufactureSku
- manufactureName
- searchable
- unit
- onlineFlag
- defaultVariantId

This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{productId}` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>productId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Product ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Product Category Assignment

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-product-category-assignment>`

Updates the category product assignment with the specified information, such as position. As the
assigned position is a normalized target position, the product is assigned to a position so that the
order of positions is maintained.

For example, if products A, B, C, and D occupy positions 1, 2, 3, and 4 and you update product A
with a new position of 3, the end result is:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Product</p></td><td><p>Position</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>B</p></td><td><p>1</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>C</p></td><td><p>2</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>A</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>D</p></td><td><p>4</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

If you then update product C to no position, the end result is:

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Product</p></td><td><p>Position</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>B</p></td><td><p>1</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>A</p></td><td><p>2</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>D</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>C</p></td><td><p>null</p></td></tr></tbody></table>

If there are n existing positioned assignments, updating a product to position >= n results in a new
assignment with a position such that the order of the positions is maintained.

This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to the
`/product/catalogs/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/catalogs/{catalogId}/categories/{categoryId}/products/{productId}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>catalogId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the requested catalog.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>categoryId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the category to update.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>productId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID (SKU) of the requested product to assign.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Product Option

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-product-option>`

Updates a local product option with the information provided. This operation makes an HTTP PATCH
request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{productId}/product-options/{id}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time ## Update Product Option value

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-product-option-value>`

Updates a local product option value with the information provided. This operation makes an HTTP
PATCH request to the
`/product/products/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/products/{productId}/product-options/{optionId}/values/{id}`
endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default option.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>productId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the product.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the local product option value.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>String</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#HttpResponseAttributes">HTTP Response Attributes</a></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Configurations

- [OAuth2 Configuration](#DataConfiguration)

### Throws

- DATA:BAD_REQUEST
- DATA:CLIENT_ERROR
- DATA:CONNECTIVITY
- DATA:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:NOT_ACCEPTABLE
- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED
- DATA:SERVER_ERROR
- DATA:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS
- DATA:UNAUTHORIZED
- DATA:UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE

## Update Promotion

`<commerce-cloud-dataapi:update-promotion>`

Updates the promotion with the specified information. This operation makes an HTTP PATCH request to
the `/pricing/promotions/{version}/organizations/{organizationId}/promotions/{id}` endpoint.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Content</p></td><td><div><div><p>Binary</p></div></div></td><td><p>Content to use.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>version</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>API version.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>organizationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Organization ID.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>id</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the promotion to update.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>siteId</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Site ID used as a query parameter to query the data for a specific site.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p><strong>X</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timeout for the request to the remote service.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Response Timeout Unit</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time unit that qualifies the Response Timeout.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable in which to store the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression that evaluates against the operationâs output. The outcome of this expression is stored in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection Strategy</p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#reconnectForever">ReconnectForever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Retry strategy in case of connectivity errors.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

- DATA:NOT_FOUND
- DATA:RETRY_EXHAUSTED

- DATA:TIMEOUT
- DATA:TOO_MANY_REQUESTS

request to the
